zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert DE ROUCY於0948年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒蒙特迪迪時，他的父親Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims18歲，母親Alberada de Lorraine18歲。他和Ermengarde d'Aquitaine至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於0990年4月19日在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯享年42歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert DE ROUCY于0948年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒蒙特迪迪时，他的父亲Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims18岁，母亲Alberada de Lorraine18岁。他和Ermengarde d'Aquitaine至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于0990年4月19日在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯享年42岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ROUCY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert DE ROUCY was born in 0948, in Montdidier, Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims, was 18 and his mother, Alberada de Lorraine, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. He died on 19 April 0990, in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert DE ROUCY est né en 0948, à Montdidier, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alberada de Lorraine, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. Il est décédé le 19 avril 0990, à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert DE ROUCY 0948 in Montdidier, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims 18 und seine Mutter Alberada de Lorraine 18. Er hatte mit Ermengarde d'Aquitaine mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 0990 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert DE ROUCY è nato il nel 0948 nel Montdidier, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Alberada de Lorraine, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. Morì il 19 aprile 0990, nel Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert DE ROUCYが0948年にフランスロレィヌモセルモントディディエルで生まれた時，父Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reimsは18歳，母Alberada de Lorraineは18歳であった。彼はErmengarde d'Aquitaineとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は0990年4月19日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズで42歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert DE ROUCY(이)가 0948년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 몽디디어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Alberada de Lorraine(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Ermengarde d'Aquitaine(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0990년 4월 19일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert DE ROUCY nasceu em 0948, em Montdidier, Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Alberada de Lorraine, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 0990, em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert DE ROUCY родился в 0948 г. в местности монтдидиир, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alberada de Lorraine, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. Он умер 19 апреля 0990 г. в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert DE ROUCY nació en 0948, en Montdidier, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Renaud comte de Roucy et de Reims, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Alberada de Lorraine, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Ermengarde d'Aquitaine. Murió el 19 de abril de 0990, en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
